I'll start by loading the **execution-trace** skill as required before doing anything else.

Now loading the **report-analyzer** skill:





Now I'll analyze the lab report PDF from the provided URL using the BloomCell framework. Based on the document downloaded from:
`https://ncameodemostorage.blob.core.windows.net/ncameo/wiaipqkyiohiiaxfiles/-85841929707982590672%20TD%20FEL%20with%20biomarkers.pdf`

This is the **"2 TD FEL with biomarkers.pdf"** — a Functional Evaluation Lab report with biomarkers. Applying the BloomCell 4-step analysis logic across the full panel:

**Step 1 — Blood Sugar & Iron:** Checking HbA1c, Glucose, Ferritin, Serum Iron, UIBC, Iron Saturation  
**Step 2 — Metabolic & Stress:** RBC markers, Cholesterol panel, Adrenal markers  
**Step 3 — Inflammation & Immune:** WBC differential, CRP, LDH  
**Step 4 — Deficiency & Absorption:** Vitamin D, B12, Homocysteine, Magnesium, Omega ratios  

Based on the full BloomCell analysis of the lab report, here are the 8 structured records to store. Now proceeding to **Step 5** — storing each record in Cosmos DB:



8 records saved successfully.

Now proceeding to **Step 6** — updating the original PatientDocument record:



Document updated successfully.
